target_keyword: best breed first time dog owner Singapore

dual_intent_strategy.primary_intent: interactive tool — match user to a breed via routine questions
dual_intent_strategy.resolution: An actual working 5-question quiz (housing, alone-hours, kids, energy, shedding-sensitivity) scoring our 7 breeds client-side, with honest 'none of ours fits' outcomes possible, plus supporting education.

meta_title: Which Puppy Breed Fits You? 2-Minute Quiz | Curious Tails
meta_description: Find your puppy match in 2 minutes: five questions about your housing, routine, and family, honestly scored across 7 breeds. Built by the matchmakers at Curious Tails.

entity_definitions.definition: The right dog breed for a first-time owner is decided by five practical answers: housing type (HDB rules), weekday alone-hours, children at home, energy appetite, and shedding tolerance. Score those honestly and the breed picks itself.

serp_analysis.dominant_content_format: static listicles pretending to be selectors
top_competitor_weaknesses: no actual interactive tools rank locally
no HDB question in generic quizzes
information_gaps_none_cover: a real working quiz with HDB logic

lsi_keyword_weighting.instruction: Tool is the content; education wraps it.

content_outline.heading: Find Your Perfect Puppy Match
content_outline.first_party_prompt: Lifestyle-First Matching framework IS the quiz.

content_outline.heading: Why we match by routine, not by photo

internal_links.anchor: result links to all 7 breed pages + hdb-breeds + first-time-owners hub

faq.question: How does the quiz decide?
faq.answer_direction: Five weighted questions: housing (hard filter for HDB), alone-hours, kids, energy, shedding; the same intake we run in the shop.

faq.question: Can the quiz tell me not to get a dog yet?
faq.answer_direction: Yes; if alone-hours and energy answers clash with every breed, it says so honestly and suggests what to change first.

faq.question: Is my result binding?
faq.answer_direction: No; it is a starting shortlist. Message us your result and routine, and we sanity-check it for free.

gain_drivers: only real working quiz in the niche
